/usr/bin/clang++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MusicPlayerAdapter.dir/MusicPlayerAdapter_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MusicPlayerAdapter.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MusicPlayerAdapter.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o MusicPlayerAdapter.app/Contents/MacOS/MusicPlayerAdapter -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtMultimedia.framework/Versions/A/QtMultimedia /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework AppKit -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtNetwork.framework/Versions/A/QtNetwork /opt/homebrew/opt/qt/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
